delete.description: Delete a user from the current organization

getAll.description: Retrieve many users in the current organization

update.description: Update a user in the current organization

add.description: Add a member to a team

remove.description: Remove a member from a team

title.description: Title of the dashboard to create

folderId.description: Folder to create the dashboard in - if the folder is unspecified, the dashboard will be saved to the General folder. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

email.description: Email of the team to create

dashboardUidOrUrl.description: Unique alphabetic identifier or URL of the dashboard to update

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

name.description: Name of the team to filter by

folderId.description: Folder to move the dashboard into - if the folder is unspecified, the dashboard will be saved to the General folder. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

email.description: Email of the team to update

name.description: Name of the team to update
Name of the team to create

teamId.description: Team to retrieve all members from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

userId.description: ID of the user to delete

memberId.description: User to remove from the team. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
